AWAKENED-CAW.chant: Increase the damage of all [gold]Caw[/gold] cards by {Caw:diff()} this combat.
AWAKENED-GATHER.chant: Put a card from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
AWAKENED-GREAT_HEX.chant: Target enemy gains {GreatHexPower:diff()} [gold]Manaburn[/gold] at the end of each of its turns.
AWAKENED-NIHIL.chant: ALL enemies lose HP equal to their [gold]Manaburn[/gold].
AWAKENED-RAVEN_STRIKE.chant: Play the top card of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
AWAKENED-TAKE_FLIGHT.chant: [gold]Block[/gold] is not removed at the start of your next turn.
